variants.newElement: a black tie wedding guest look
variants.angle: the feed is asking what would I wear and this answers it with your own face

variants.newElement: restored and in motion for ten seconds
variants.angle: the celebrity wedding points everyone back to the album in their own house

variants.newElement: a one tap recreate template with credit
variants.angle: couples already recreate famous photos and this week supplies the pose

briefs.audience: people following the wedding of the year from their couch
briefs.insight: the whole feed is asking one question, what would I wear to that wedding, and nobody has an answer photo
briefs.assetXElement: your selfie x a black tie wedding guest look
briefs.successMetric: generation to share rate within 48 hours

referenceSet.note: transformation before and after pattern, hook leads with the question the feed is already asking

generationPrompts.image: Editorial phone frame composition, before and after split: left a casual mirror selfie, right the same person styled in a black tie wedding guest look, evening light, champagne and garden party depth behind. Editorial tech cover with a defocused photographic background: a saturated color core melting into shadow, visible depth of field, subtle film grain, no flat fills. No logos, no watermarks. 16:9.
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three shot script: shot 1 the plain mirror selfie on a phone screen; shot 2 the styled wedding guest version steps into a garden evening; shot 3 the hook line lands, 6 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, about finally having an answer to what you would wear, restrained tone, no exclamation marks

briefs.audience: anyone whose parents' wedding album lives in a shoebox
briefs.insight: a celebrity wedding makes everyone think about the weddings in their own family, and the photos are already in the house
briefs.assetXElement: your parents' wedding photo x restored, in motion for ten seconds
briefs.successMetric: 7 day share rate into family threads

referenceSet.note: restoration reveals are battle tested UGC grammar, emotion carried by the user's own material

generationPrompts.image: A restored vintage wedding photograph held gently in two hands, the restored version glowing with recovered color and detail against the faded original beneath, warm domestic light. Editorial tech cover with a defocused photographic background: a saturated color core melting into shadow, visible depth of field, subtle film grain, no flat fills. No logos, no watermarks. 16:9.
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three shot script: shot 1 the faded print in a shoebox; shot 2 color and detail return, the couple begins their first dance for ten seconds; shot 3 the hook line lands over the moving frame, 8 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, about parents dancing again, restrained tone, no exclamation marks

briefs.audience: couples who already recreate famous photos together
briefs.insight: recreating an iconic pose is an interaction couples already know, and this week hands them the most discussed pose on earth
briefs.assetXElement: the iconic wedding pose x a one tap recreate template with credit
briefs.successMetric: recreation chain length per seeded template

referenceSet.note: recreation chains compound when the template credits the previous couple, ugc loop grammar

generationPrompts.image: A side by side pair: left an editorial wedding portrait pose in silhouette, faces not visible, right an ordinary couple in their kitchen recreating the exact pose, phone camera realism. Authentic phone-camera still, natural handheld framing, real lighting imperfections, no studio retouching, no added graphic elements. A small credit tag in the corner of the right frame. No logos, no watermarks. 16:9.
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three shot script: shot 1 the silhouette pose reference; shot 2 the couple lines up the same pose at home, laughing; shot 3 the credit tag stamps on and the hook line lands, 6 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, inviting couples to recreate the pose everyone is talking about, restrained tone, no exclamation marks

plan.rationale: Wave 4 splits traffic evenly across three variants for "the wedding everyone is watching"; the 21-day observation window covers the full fatigue-curve inflection point

judged.notes: Phone frame before and after lands the makeover cleanly; format is familiar, hence shareable 2.

Restored print against the faded original in warm domestic light; the strongest emotional read of the wave.

decided.reason: last-3-day average CTR 0.0022 fell below the preregistered killAt 0.015: verdict: kill
last-3-day average CTR 0.0372 reached the preregistered scaleAt 0.035: verdict: scale
last-3-day average CTR 0.0318 sits between killAt and scaleAt, slope has not tripped the fatigue threshold: verdict: iterate

injectedLearnings: Winning traits from wave 3: thing asset "your profile picture" + angleType=evergreen + HOOK=THEP. Prioritize reusing these asset shapes and angleType combinations in new variants.
